evals.description: Triggers on Chrome DevTools performance debugging request
evals.prompt: My React app takes 3 seconds to load. How do I find what's slow using Chrome DevTools?

evals.description: Triggers on memory leak investigation request
evals.prompt: My Node.js server's memory keeps growing over time and eventually crashes. How do I find the leak?

evals.description: Triggers on Node.js debugger / inspector request
evals.prompt: How do I attach Chrome DevTools to a running Node.js process to use breakpoints?

evals.description: Can write a working strace command for file tracing
evals.prompt: My program silently fails to read its config file. Show me how to use strace to find which file path it's trying to open.

evals.description: Can explain how to use conditional breakpoints
evals.prompt: I have a loop over 10,000 items and the bug only happens for one specific item ID. I don't want the debugger stopping on every iteration. What should I do?

evals.description: Can explain logpoints as an alternative to console.log
evals.prompt: I keep adding and removing console.log statements while debugging. Is there a better way?

evals.description: Can explain reading a call stack correctly
evals.prompt: I see an error at the top of my stack trace but I don't understand what caused it. How do I read a call stack?

evals.description: Can produce correct curl command for timing network phases
evals.prompt: How do I measure exactly how long DNS, TCP connect, and TLS handshake take for a curl request?

evals.description: Can explain core dump analysis with lldb
evals.prompt: My C++ daemon crashed and produced a core file. Walk me through analyzing it with lldb.

evals.description: Applies the binary-search principle to a debugging scenario
evals.prompt: An API request is taking 5 seconds. I don't know if it's slow in the frontend, the backend, or the database. How do I approach this?

evals.description: Warns against fixing without understanding root cause
evals.prompt: My test started passing after I changed a random line. Should I just commit this?

evals.description: Does not trigger for code review or refactoring task
evals.prompt: Can you review this function and suggest better variable names?
